content:
error handling" / "add validation" / "handle edge cases"
2156: - "Write tests for the above" (without actual test code)
2157: - "Similar to Task N" (repeat the code — the engineer may be reading tasks out of order)
2158: - Steps that describe what to do without showing how (code blocks required for code steps)
2159: - References to types, functions, or methods not defined in any task
